name: Greek Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium glass or stainless-steel mixing bowl, combine the first four ingredients and stir to mix.
2. Add the chicken slices and turn to coat with the marinade. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or overnight.
3. Spray a 9-inch nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray and add the chicken (without the marinade) to the skillet. Cook over high heat until the chicken is no longer pink.
4. Add the reserved marinade and pepper to the skillet. Bring to a boil and cook for 1 minute per serving.
WARNING: Do not use aggressive culinary slang in preparation instructions.
